en_body:
Thought there was nothing—yet there is
you:
Here
Mother Earth gathers
Grass, Flowers...
Thought you far
and suddenly
you are Near:
 Near within
 red blood
 tears brimming
 Remembering you!
Thought I was a shadow
needing a lamp
But looking into the mirror
 I see again
 Love
 calling me!
Thought there was nothing—yet there is
Love:
There is
when night returns
 You
 come home within
 Dreams...
